calculation_interval.description:
How often the alert is checked: hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly.

* `hourly` - hourly
* `daily` - daily
* `weekly` - weekly
* `monthly` - monthly

condition.description: Alert condition type. Determines how the value is evaluated: absolute_value, relative_increase, or relative_decrease.

check_ongoing_interval.description: When true, evaluate the current (still incomplete) time interval in addition to completed ones.

series_index.description: Zero-based index of the series in the insight's query to monitor.

config.description: Trends-specific alert configuration. Includes series_index (which series to monitor) and check_ongoing_interval (whether to check the current incomplete interval).

diffs_n.description: Order of differencing. 0 = raw values, 1 = first-order diffs (default: 0)

lags_n.description: Number of lag features. 0 = none, >0 = include n lagged values (default: 0)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

threshold.description: Anomaly probability threshold [0-1]. Points above this probability are flagged (default: 0.9)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating mean/std (default: 30)

smooth_n.description: Moving average window size. 0 = no smoothing, >1 = smooth over n points (default: 0)

threshold.description: Anomaly probability threshold [0-1]. Points above this probability are flagged (default: 0.9)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating median/MAD (default: 30)

multiplier.description: IQR multiplier for fence calculation (default: 1.5, use 3.0 for far outliers)

window.description: Rolling window size for calculating quartiles (default: 30)

lower_bound.description: Lower bound - values below this are anomalies

enabled.description: Whether the alert is actively being evaluated.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this alert configuration.

insight.description: Insight ID monitored by this alert. Note: Response returns full InsightBasicSerializer object.

skip_weekend.description: Skip alert evaluation on weekends (Saturday and Sunday).

snoozed_until.description: Snooze the alert until this time. Pass a relative date string (e.g. '2h', '1d') or null to unsnooze.

subscribed_users.description: User IDs to subscribe to this alert. Note: Response returns full UserBasicSerializer object.

threshold.description: Threshold configuration with bounds and type for evaluating the alert.

configuration.description: Threshold bounds and type. Includes bounds (lower/upper floats) and type (absolute or percentage).

lower.description: Alert fires when the value drops below this number.

upper.description: Alert fires when the value exceeds this number.
